request.sql: SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.amount, o.status, o.created_at, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE (u.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status ON public.orders USING btree (status)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_created ON public.orders USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_order_no_key ON public.orders USING btree (order_no)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_pkey ON public.orders USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_name ON public.users USING btree (name)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_status_created ON public.users USING btree (status, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_email_key ON public.users USING btree (email)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_pkey ON public.users USING btree (id)

request.templateSql:
SELECT
            o.id,
            o.order_no,
            o.user_id,
            o.amount,
            o.status,
            o.created_at,
            u.name AS user_name,
            u.email AS user_email
        FROM orders o
        JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id
        <where>
            <if test="keyword != null and keyword != ''">
                AND (u.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
            </if>
            <if test="status != null and status != ''">
                AND o.status = #{status}
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
        LIMIT #{limit}
        OFFSET #{offset}
